name: Carnival of Salvador
traditions: Electric trio trucks (trios elétricos) with live music; blocos afro celebrating African heritage; axé music; afoxé processions.
historicalBackground: Salvador's Carnival is rooted in African cultural traditions preserved by the large Afro-Brazilian community of Bahia. It emerged as a distinct celebration in the 20th century.
description: Brazil's most Afro-centric carnival celebration in Salvador da Bahia, featuring electric trio trucks, axé music, and powerful African-heritage processions.
